title: Slovakian Custard Cake
description: A traditional Slovakian dessert, this custard cake is rich, crumbly, and utterly delicious.
instructions: Make the custard by whisking together the milk, sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract in a medium saucepan.
Cook the custard over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it thickens.
Strain the custard into a clean bowl and let cool.
Roll out the Slovakian pastry and place in a 23cm springform pan.
Spread the cooled custard over the pastry, leaving a 2cm border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the custard to form a crust.
Brush the pastry with melted butter and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
